title: karwinskia calderonii
intro: Karwinskia calderonii, also known as Copal Tree or Copal, is a small tree or shrub native to Mexico, belonging to the Anacardiaceae family. It has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial, and antioxidant effects. The health benefits of Karwinskia calderonii include reducing fever, relieving pain and inflammation, and treating respiratory issues such as bronchitis and asthma. Karwinskia calderonii is commonly prepared as an herbal tea, infusion, or tincture to harness its medicinal properties.
